text.title: Exploratory Charter Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns that degrade exploratory sessions. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Explorer wanders across the product; observation log mixes onboarding, billing, and settings findings.
antipattern.root-cause: Mission was vague or multi-objective; the session became "look at everything".
antipattern.fix: Reject charter submission when mission is shorter than 20 characters or names more than one target. Pre-commit lint on the charter file enforces this.

antipattern.symptom: Session runs 2 hours; observation log degrades sharply in the last 30 minutes.
antipattern.root-cause: Time-box was extended mid-session; fatigue produced low-quality observations.
antipattern.fix: Strict time-box enforced. If the mission needs more time, schedule a follow-up session with its own charter; do not extend in place.

antipattern.symptom: Observation log is written after the session ends from memory; entries lack timestamps or specific reproducer steps.
antipattern.root-cause: Continuous logging feels like overhead; explorer defers it.
antipattern.fix: Log entries during the session only; entries written after the time-box are excluded from the debrief. Use a hotkey or template to lower the cost of logging.

antipattern.symptom: Debrief lands 3-5 days after the session; key findings collapse to "the bug list".
antipattern.root-cause: Nuance fades quickly after a session; debrief becomes a fill-in-the-blanks task.
antipattern.fix: 24-hour SLA on the debrief. Calendar the debrief slot at session schedule; validator rejects published_at later than +24h.

antipattern.symptom: Charter's "focus areas" looks like a 30-line checklist; explorer ticks items rather than generating ideas.
antipattern.root-cause: Discomfort with unstructured time produces fake structure.
antipattern.fix: Charter focus_areas capped at 5 entries with heuristic labels only. Test-case checklists belong in the automated suite.

antipattern.symptom: The explorer wrote the code; observation log misses obvious failure modes the explorer is blind to.
antipattern.root-cause: Authorship blinds the explorer to assumptions; solo session ratifies what the author already believes.
antipattern.fix: Pair-explore (two names on the charter) when the explorer is biased. If pairing is not possible, skip the methodology — see skip-this-methodology rule.
